task: Advanced high-value task: Cfd Surrogate Validation Sample Data-Driven Design Review. Scenario: a validation lead needs a compact but complete evidence trail for an expert signoff meeting for cfd surrogate validation sample. Embedded packet: Records: R1 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=53 surrogate_drop_kPa=83 porosity_pct=8; R2 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=62 surrogate_drop_kPa=79 porosity_pct=11; R3 CFD_pressure_drop_kPa=48 surrogate_drop_kPa=94 porosity_pct=7. Remediation options: O1 changes CFD_pressure_drop_kPa by -12% cost=83000; O2 changes surrogate_drop_kPa by -18% cost=99400; O3 changes porosity_pct by -25% cost=58600; max_budget=124800. Rules and constraints: absolute percent error>15% fails; porosity<40 may be outside support; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: build a row-level evidence table, then write the decision logic that separates pass, warning, failure, and needs_review cases. Deliver CFD_surrogate_2.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
